payload.response: {"scan":{"alerts":[{"business_exposure":{"affected_customers":["Canal Rail"],"affected_orders":["SO-7991"],"constrained_inventory":true,"revenue_at_risk":3330000},"citations":{"headlines":["H01"],"records":["suppliers.yaml: SUP-NORTHSIL -> silicone_elastomer, POT-72; tier2 note on metallurgical-grade silicon availability","bom.yaml: RSG-700 -> POT-72 -> silicone_elastomer","orders.yaml: SO-7991","inventory.yaml: RSG-700 quantity_available 22"]},"confidence":"medium","enterprise_path":["silicone_elastomer","POT-72","RSG-700","SO-7991"],"id":"ALT-001","latent_edge_hypothesis":"Hydro curtailments shutting Quebec silicon metal furnaces can tighten metallurgical-grade silicon availability, which may constrain silicone base polymer feedstock for NorthSil Compounds' silicone_elastomer supply into Aster Vale's POT-72 potting compound used in RSG-700.","real_world_prior":"Silicone supply chains are sensitive to upstream silicon metal availability; disruptions at energy-intensive silicon furnaces can propagate into silicone intermediates and specialty compounds with multiweek lead times.","reasoning":"Headline H01 reports Quebec hydro curtailments forcing silicon metal furnaces offline. In company records, supplier SUP-NORTHSIL supplies input silicone_elastomer and component POT-72, and notes that its silicone base polymer is indexed to metallurgical-grade silicon availability. BOM records show silicone_elastomer is an input to POT-72, which is required for the vibration_hardened RSG-700. Order SO-7991 is an open strategic order for 180 units of RSG-700, while inventory shows only 22 units available, so any inbound constraint on POT-72 is plausibly business-relevant now.","source_headlines":["H01"],"uncertainty":["The disruption is upstream and indirect: the record links NorthSil to metallurgical-grade silicon availability, not specifically to the affected Quebec furnaces.","NorthSil's listed site is in Ontario, so the exposure depends on broader regional silicon tightness rather than a confirmed direct outage at its own site.","No supplier allocation notice or shipment delay is yet recorded in company data."]}],"no_alert_rationale":null,"result":"alerts_found","run_id":"LSR-033"}}
